note: GitHub Discussions GraphQL API not accessible via available MCP tools. Metrics below are inferred from issue labels and issue cross-references.

discussion_label_proxy.note: Based on 100-issue sample. Full count would require paginated fetch.

top_discussion_themes_inferred: Model compatibility issues (Models label — 22 closed in 30d)
UI/UX feedback and feature requests (20 closed in 30d)
MCP server configuration questions (7 closed in 30d)
Agent workflow design (discussion + help wanted labels)

unanswered_items.title: Unified Notification Center (P1)
unanswered_items.note: P1 feature with no community comment — needs visibility

action_needed: To enable full discussion analytics, configure gh CLI access or add a Discussions-capable GraphQL MCP endpoint.
workaround_query: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } } } } }'
